positive.choiceText: Good evening, I'm Officer Svoboda. I've received a complaint about loud music. Can we find a way together to keep the volume at a level that's acceptable for everyone?
positive.professionalImpact: Positive choice builds trust and increases the chance of voluntary cooperation.

neutral.choiceText: Good evening, I've received a complaint from your neighbors about loud music. What's going on here and how can I resolve this?
neutral.improvement: Add more context and empathy to strengthen cooperation.

negative.choiceText: Good evening, I'm asking you to turn that music off immediately or you'll get a fine.
negative.consequences: Negative choice increases conflict and reduces trust.

keyLearningPoints: Balancing a professional tone with empathy is key.
Transparent communication supports trust.
Ultimatums increase tension — cooperation is more effective.

positive.choiceText: I understand this is your space. But at the same time, quiet hours apply so that others can sleep too. Let's agree on a volume level that's fair for everyone.
positive.professionalImpact: Positive choice builds trust and increases the chance of voluntary cooperation.

neutral.choiceText: You're at home, I understand that. At the same time, I have an official complaint. Let's resolve this through a conversation to avoid further steps.
neutral.improvement: Add more context and empathy to strengthen cooperation.

negative.choiceText: This isn't just your home, it's part of a community. If you make noise at night, there will be consequences for you.
negative.consequences: Negative choice increases conflict and reduces trust.

keyLearningPoints: Balancing a professional tone with empathy is key.
Transparent communication supports trust.
Ultimatums increase tension — cooperation is more effective.

positive.choiceText: You could close the windows, turn down the bass, move the party inside, and agree on a time when the music will stop.
positive.professionalImpact: Positive choice builds trust and increases the chance of voluntary cooperation.

neutral.choiceText: Try turning down the volume and see if that's enough for the neighbors. If not, try to work it out together.
neutral.improvement: Add more context and empathy to strengthen cooperation.

negative.choiceText: Either turn off the music right now and stop disturbing quiet hours, or I'll fine you.
negative.consequences: Negative choice increases conflict and reduces trust.

keyLearningPoints: Balancing a professional tone with empathy is key.
Transparent communication supports trust.
Ultimatums increase tension — cooperation is more effective.

positive.choiceText: Thank you for your cooperation. To summarize: the music will be quieter and will end by one. If anything comes up again, both you and the neighbors have my contact information.
positive.professionalImpact: Positive choice builds trust and increases the chance of voluntary cooperation.

neutral.choiceText: Fine, let's leave it at that. I expect you to keep to what was agreed.
neutral.improvement: Add more context and empathy to strengthen cooperation.

negative.choiceText: Fine, so we have a deal, but I'm warning you — any further violation will result in immediate sanctions.
negative.consequences: Negative choice increases conflict and reduces trust.

keyLearningPoints: Balancing a professional tone with empathy is key.
Transparent communication supports trust.
Ultimatums increase tension — cooperation is more effective.

positive.choiceText: No problem at all — we just agreed to lower the volume so everyone can get a good night's sleep.
positive.professionalImpact: Positive choice builds trust and increases the chance of voluntary cooperation.

neutral.choiceText: There was a noise complaint, it's been resolved. Please go back inside the apartment.
neutral.improvement: Add more context and empathy to strengthen cooperation.

negative.choiceText: That's none of your concern, everything's been resolved. Go back inside.
negative.consequences: Negative choice increases conflict and reduces trust.

keyLearningPoints: Balancing a professional tone with empathy is key.
Transparent communication supports trust.
Ultimatums increase tension — cooperation is more effective.

positive.choiceText: Yes, we agreed the music will be turned down and will end by 1:00 AM. If it continues or happens again, let us know.
positive.professionalImpact: Positive choice builds trust and increases the chance of voluntary cooperation.

neutral.choiceText: They said they'd turn it down. We'll see how it goes. If it continues, call us.
neutral.improvement: Add more context and empathy to strengthen cooperation.

negative.choiceText: Everything's been resolved, you don't need to worry about anything else.
negative.consequences: Negative choice increases conflict and reduces trust.

keyLearningPoints: Balancing a professional tone with empathy is key.
Transparent communication supports trust.
Ultimatums increase tension — cooperation is more effective.

positive.choiceText: I maintained a calm tone, offered specific options, and summarized the agreement. But I can also see areas where I could have shown more empathy.
positive.professionalImpact: Positive choice builds trust and increases the chance of voluntary cooperation.

neutral.choiceText: The important thing is the music got quieter. And I followed most of the procedure.
neutral.improvement: Add more context and empathy to strengthen cooperation.

negative.choiceText: I just did what was necessary to prevent the situation from escalating.
negative.consequences: Negative choice increases conflict and reduces trust.

keyLearningPoints: Balancing a professional tone with empathy is key.
Transparent communication supports trust.
Ultimatums increase tension — cooperation is more effective.

communicationEffectiveness.description: Overall quality of communication during the noise complaint resolution

excellent: Consistent use of a cooperative tone
Maintaining open dialogue with all parties

emotionalIntelligence.description: Ability to recognize and respond to the resident's and neighbors' emotions

excellent: Empathetic summary and thanks for cooperation
poor: Refusing to listen to the resident

proceduralCompliance.description: Adherence to procedures and community policing principles

excellent: Transparent communication of the reason for the intervention
Explanation of quiet hours and the legal framework
Ensuring the option for follow-up contact

communityTrust.description: Building trust with neighbors and the community

excellent: Providing information to other neighbors as well

escalation.impact: Each escalation reduces willingness to cooperate and increases tension.
escalation.correction: Practice de-escalation techniques and patient explanation.

avoidance.impact: The problem remains unresolved and may return.
avoidance.correction: Provide specific and actionable solution options.

judgmental.correction: Maintain professional language and a neutral approach.

excellentPhrases: 'Good evening, I'm Officer Svoboda. I've received a complaint about loud music. Can we find a way together to keep the volume at a level that's acceptable for everyone?'
'I understand this is your space. But at the same time, quiet hours apply so that others can sleep too. Let's agree on a volume level that's fair for everyone.'
'Thank you for your cooperation. To summarize: the music will be quieter and will end by one. If anything comes up again, both you and the neighbors have my contact information.'
poorPhrases: 'Good evening, I'm asking you to turn that music off immediately or you'll get a fine.'
'That's none of your concern, everything's been resolved. Go back inside.'
'Either turn off the music right now and stop disturbing quiet hours, or I'll fine you.'

analysisCriteria.tone: Was an appropriate tone and approach used?
analysisCriteria.clarity: Was the message clear and understandable?
analysisCriteria.empathy: Did it show understanding of emotions and frustration?
analysisCriteria.effectiveness: Did it lead to agreement and calming of the situation?
analysisCriteria.professionalism: Did it maintain neutrality and professionalism?

scenarioSpecificLessons.1: The opening tone sets the atmosphere for the entire interaction.
scenarioSpecificLessons.2: Acknowledging the resident's rights must go hand in hand with explaining community rules.
scenarioSpecificLessons.3: Offering multiple practical options increases voluntary compliance.
scenarioSpecificLessons.4: Summarizing the agreement and thanking strengthens cooperation.
scenarioSpecificLessons.5: Response to guests and other neighbors affects trust in the police.
scenarioSpecificLessons.6: Transparent communication with the community prevents repeated complaints.
scenarioSpecificLessons.7: Self-reflection after an intervention supports professional growth.
